title: nerve model catalog
description: Committed catalog of usable models. No secrets — API keys live in .env (GEMINI_API_KEY / DEEPSEEK_API_KEY). Adding a model = adding an entry here, never a code path.

$schema.description: Path to this schema file, enabling editor IntelliSense + validation.

models.description: Usable models, roughly ordered by increasing capability/cost.

id.description: Exact model id sent to the provider API (e.g. "deepseek-v4-flash", "gemini-3.5-pro").

provider.description: Which provider serves this model. nerve supports ONLY these two.

label.description: Human-friendly description shown in the picker / status line.

default.description: Mark exactly one model as the startup default. If none is marked, the first entry is used.

temperature.description: Optional sampling temperature override for this model.

thinking.description: Optional: request the provider's reasoning/thinking mode for this model.

contextWindow.description: Max context window in tokens — drives the 'context used / max' indicator.

pricing.description: USD per 1,000,000 tokens — drives session cost tracking. Omit for an unreleased/unknown model.

input.description: Input (prompt) price per 1M tokens, USD (standard / cache-miss rate).

cachedInput.description: Optional cache-hit input price per 1M tokens, USD.
